creator: matthew@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 161822
Update to pkg-plist

Make the pkg-plist lines for localised versions of man pages conditional on the setting of the NLS option.  If NLS is turned off, those man pages are not generated.

No PORTREVISION bump as this has no effect under the default setting of NLS=on, and there wouldn't have been a package of 0.95.7 at all with NLS=off.
